channel.title: Apple on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Apple on Archive 03

item.title: Is Apple Falling Behind in the AI War? Why They Might Be Underrated
item.description: Despite delays in Siri’s overhaul and debates over its AI competitiveness, Apple ($AAPL) maintains a massive ecosystem of 2 billion devices and solid service revenue. We examine whether Apple is an AI loser or if it’s poised to repeat its historical pattern of entering late and disrupting the market.

item.title: 'Cash is King!' Why is Warren Buffett Continuously Selling Stocks?
item.description: Berkshire Hathaway, led by the sage of investing Warren Buffett, is amassing a record level of cash and selling Apple stock. Dive into a sharp debate among three girls about whether this is a danger sign heralding a market crash or preparation for a massive opportunity.
